en: I have a confession to make, but first, I want you to make a little confession to me.
In the past year, I want you to just raise your hand if you've experienced relatively
ko: 지난 1년 동안, 스트레스를 거의 느끼지 않은 분은 손을 들어주세요.

en: little stress. Anyone? How about a moderate amount of stress? Who's experienced a lot of stress?
Yeah, me too. But that is not my confession. My confession is this. I'm a health psychologist,
and my mission is to help people be happier and healthier. But I fear that something I've
ko: 제 임무는 사람들이 더 행복하고 건강해지도록 돕는 거예요.

en: been teaching for the last 10 years is doing more harm than good, and it has to do with stress.
